---
name: Feature request
about: A new transform, short-circuit, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What you'd like**
A clear description of the behavior you want.

**The traffic that motivates it**
What does Claude Code actually send that you'd like handled? Structural signals
(schema shape, tool names, landmarks) are what the proxy keys off — describe
them if you can.

**Fail-open consideration**
How should detection behave when it *misses*? (The project never mutates a
request it isn't sure about — see CONTRIBUTING.md.)
